Home Contact

Contact

contact

Contact Us & Request a Quote

Have questions? Need a quote? We're here to help. Get in touch or tell us about your locker room project—we'll respond within 2–3 business days.

How our quote process works

Share your project details in the form below. We'll prepare an accurate quote and walk you through options. 50% deposit to begin production. Quick ship in one month or custom-built in three months.

1. You tell us your sport, quantities, and requirements.
2. We send a detailed quote within 2–3 business days.
3. We review with you and refine until it's right.
Need help now? Call +1 (888) 58-STALL or email info@customsportslockers.com.

Tell us about your project

Fields marked with * are required.

Project & Locker Details

1000 characters left

Contact & Organization Details

Drawings & Attachments (optional)

Attach floor plans, locker room layouts, or inspiration photos to help our team prepare the most accurate quote. For files larger than 10 MB, please email info@customsportslockers.com.

By submitting this form, you agree that a PlayerStall representative may contact you about your project. We will never share your information with third parties.

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

198 West 21th Street New York, NY 10010

info@customsportslockers.com

+88 (0) 101 0000 000
